name: crash-bot
description: Crash game trading bot with Telegram notifications

scripts.test: node -e "require('./telegram'); require('./src/config'); require('./src/analizarHistorial'); require('./src/detectarEntrada'); require('./src/calcularCashout'); require('./src/gestionarBanca'); require('./src/antiPerdidas'); console.log('OK: All modules loaded')"
scripts.build: node --check bot.js && node --check telegram.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/analizarHistorial.js && node --check src/detectarEntrada.js && node --check src/calcularCashout.js && node --check src/gestionarBanca.js && node --check src/antiPerdidas.js
